risk_flags: Significant underpricing (39% below median) may indicate undesirable views (e.g., highway/monorail facing), low floor placement, or active litigation/disputes.

Potential for upcoming special levies or building-wide maintenance assessments by the developer or owners' association.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents a classic value-add opportunity with a highly attractive entry point into Dubai's most prestigious master community. Buying at a 39% discount to the market median provides a significant margin of safety and strong potential for capital appreciation. To maximize ROI, an investor should budget for a comprehensive, high-end renovation to reposition the asset for the premium short-term holiday home market or luxury long-term rental. ai_analysis.quality_context: The Signature (DAMAC Maison Mall Street) is a high-end serviced hotel-apartment development. At 1,372 sqft, this 2-bedroom unit offers a significantly larger layout than newer Downtown Dubai handovers, which typically average 1,000 to 1,200 sqft. The property is fully furnished to hotel standards and offered vacant, allowing for immediate occupancy or rental placement. While DAMAC Maison provides premium hospitality amenities (spa, valet, concierge, pool), the build quality and aesthetic are tailored to a hospitality-focused product rather than a traditional residential tower.
risk_flags: High Service Charges: Serviced apartments under the DAMAC Maison brand carry significantly higher service charges (often 30-50% higher than standard residential towers in Downtown), which will heavily compress net rental yields.

Developer Discount: DAMAC properties in Downtown historically trade at a discount compared to Emaar-developed master communities due to secondary market preferences and historical maintenance standards.

Traffic Congestion: Located directly on Mall Street, the immediate vicinity suffers from severe traffic bottlenecks during peak hours, weekends, and Dubai Mall events, impacting resident accessibility.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at AED 1,749 per sqft, this property trades at a massive 32.4% discount to the Downtown Dubai market median of AED 2,587 per sqft. This low entry point offers strong downside protection and capital appreciation potential. Given its 'Vacant Now' status, turnkey furnished condition, and immediate proximity to Dubai Mall, the optimal investment strategy is short-term holiday home rentals, which can absorb the high service charges and generate double-digit gross yields. It represents an undervalued asset for cash-flow-focused investors willing to manage serviced-apartment operational costs.

description:

This unit stands out as one of the best-priced properties currently available in the building, making it a rare find for investors seeking immediate returns and long-term value appreciation.

The property is tenanted, ensuring instant rental income from day one, and offers a strong ROI, making it an ideal addition to any investment portfolio.

What truly sets this unit apart is the inclusion of two dedicated parking spaces — a highly sought-after feature in Dubai Marina that significantly enhances both rental demand and resale value.

Property Features:

* Tenanted unit – immediate income
* The lowest-priced units in the market
* Two allocated parking spaces
* Spacious layout with excellent potential
* Located in a prime marina community

Residents of Marina Heights enjoy access to a range of amenities.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Marina Heights is an established, mid-tier residential tower completed in 2006, located in the high-demand northern district of Dubai Marina. At 1,287 sqft, this 2-bedroom unit offers a highly generous layout compared to modern, more compact layouts. Priced at AED 1,546 per sqft, the property sits at a massive ~32% discount to the Dubai Marina market median of AED 2,278 per sqft. This pricing gap is primarily driven by the building's age and older aesthetic, but it represents an excellent entry point for value-seeking investors. The inclusion of two allocated parking spaces is a highly lucrative differentiator, as most 2-bedroom units in this micro-market only allocate one.
risk_flags: Building Age & CapEx: Completed in 2006, the building may require higher maintenance fees, and the unit itself may need significant capital expenditure (renovation) to command premium market rents.

RERA Rental Cap Limitations: Being sold 'tenanted' guarantees immediate cash flow, but the current rent is likely locked below current market rates due to RERA rental index restrictions, limiting immediate yield optimization.
Slower Capital Appreciation: Older towers in Dubai Marina typically experience slower capital growth compared to newer, premium waterfront developments in the same area.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property is a classic 'value-add' defensive play. The steep 32% discount to the market median provides a strong safety margin and downside protection. While the building's age limits rapid capital appreciation, the combination of immediate rental income, a spacious layout, and the rare asset of two parking spaces ensures high rental liquidity and strong net yields. This is a highly recommended buy for income-focused investors looking to secure stable, above-average ROI in a prime, high-occupancy location, with the long-term option to renovate and flip for capital gains upon tenant exit.

DEC Tower 2 is a well-established residential development in Dubai Marina, one of the most sought-after waterfront communities in Dubai. ai_analysis.quality_context: DEC Tower 2 is an established, mid-tier residential development completed in 2009. While it lacks the premium finishes and luxury status of high-end Emaar or Select Group developments in Dubai Marina, it offers highly functional layouts and a strategic location near the southern end of the Marina, close to the metro and JBR. The property's price per sqft of AED 1,276 is a massive 32.3% discount compared to the Dubai Marina market median of AED 1,884, reflecting its older age and secondary-grade classification.
risk_flags: Building Age & Maintenance: Completed in 2009, the building may face higher wear-and-tear, potentially leading to rising maintenance costs or future special levies for capital improvements.
Lower Capital Appreciation Potential: Mid-to-low tier buildings in Dubai Marina historically experience slower capital growth compared to premium, modern waterfront developments.

RERA Rental Cap Limitations: The unit is currently tenanted at AED 80,000. Increasing the rent to current market rates will be restricted by the RERA rental index, limiting immediate yield optimization.
Secondary Location: Situated at the far end of Dubai Marina, which, while highly accessible, is generally considered less premium than the central Marina or Marina Phase 1 areas.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents an exceptional high-yield, entry-level investment opportunity in Dubai Marina. With a net ROI of 6.75% (well above the Marina average of 5-5.5%) and a low service charge of AED 11/sqft, it is highly optimized for cash flow. The significant discount to the market median price per sqft provides a strong safety margin. description: Experience comfortable modern living in this beautifully furnished 1-bedroom apartment located in the sought-after Orchid Res

ai_analysis.quality_context: At 845 sqft, this 1-bedroom apartment in Orchid Residence, JVC, is exceptionally spacious compared to the standard 1-bed sizes in the area (typically 650-750 sqft). Being fully furnished adds immediate value for buy-to-let investors looking to generate immediate rental income without additional capital expenditure. JVC remains a high-demand hub for mid-income professionals due to its community infrastructure, parks, and relative affordability.
risk_flags: Significant underpricing (~34% below the market median of 1,438 AED/sqft) may indicate a distressed sale, building-specific maintenance issues, or a potential 'bait-and-switch' listing.

Orchid Residence is a mid-tier development; the high market median of 1,438 AED/sqft is heavily skewed by premium off-plan launches and newly completed luxury handovers in JVC, meaning this older property may not easily appreciate to that median level.
Potential for high outstanding service charges or developer liabilities that must be verified and cleared before transfer.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at an attractive 947 AED/sqft, this property represents a high-yield opportunity. If the listing is genuine, purchasing a fully furnished 845 sqft 1-bed at this price point in JVC offers an estimated gross rental yield of 8.5% to 9.5%, well above the Dubai average. The massive discount to the market median provides a strong margin of safety and excellent potential for capital appreciation, making it a highly recommended 'Buy' subject to rigorous physical inspection and title deed verification.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in Green Park, Jumeirah Village Triangle (JVT) District 4, this 773 sqft 1-bedroom unit offers a generous layout compared to newer, more cramped developments. The building, developed by DAMAC, is an established mid-tier project. Being 'vacant on transfer' is a major premium in the current Dubai market, allowing immediate occupancy or rental at current market rates without the 12-month eviction notice constraint.
risk_flags: Significant underpricing (31.4% below market median of 1,414 AED/sqft) may indicate urgent liquidation, outstanding service charges, or underlying building maintenance issues.
Green Park is an older development (completed circa 2013), which may carry higher maintenance fees, chiller system inefficiencies, or wear and tear in common areas.
JVT apartments historically experience slower capital appreciation compared to JVT villas/townhouses and prime Dubai master communities.
Truncated listing description suggests potential lack of agent diligence or incomplete property documentation.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: At 970 AED/sqft, this property represents a highly attractive entry point into the Dubai buy-to-let market, trading at a massive discount to the area's median. Assuming a conservative market rent of AED 55,000 - 60,000 for a 1-bed in JVT, this unit projects a gross rental yield of 7.3% to 8.0%. It is a strong 'buy' for yield-focused investors, subject to clean title deed verification and a thorough physical inspection to rule out latent defects.

Developed by Meraas, Port de La Mer is one of Dubai’s most exclusive beachfront communities, known for its Mediterranean-inspired design, relaxed luxury lifestyle, marina promenade, restaurants, cafes, and resort-style atmosphere.

This apartment stands out due to its rare waterfront positioning, upgraded interiors, and strong short-term rental performance. Limestone House is strategically located in the heart of the Dubai International Financial Center. Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in Altura 1, Waada within the rapidly expanding Dubai South district, this 401 sqft studio represents a highly competitive entry point. At AED 1,294 per sqft, the property is priced approximately 31% below the area's market median of AED 1,875 per sqft. The inclusion of a 2-year post-handover payment plan significantly enhances its appeal, offering buyers financial leverage in a high-growth zone anchored by the Al Maktoum International Airport expansion and Expo City.
risk_flags: The significant discount to the market median (AED 1,294 vs. AED 1,875) may indicate a less premium sub-developer, a less desirable unit view/floor, or an urgent liquidation by the seller.
Resale transaction complexity, requiring strict verification that the original buyer has cleared all due milestone payments with the developer before transfer.
Potential handover delays, which are common in newly developing master communities like Dubai South.
Initial rental yields may face downward pressure until surrounding infrastructure and community amenities in the Waada sub-locality are fully completed.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This resale studio is an opportunistic buy for value-driven investors. Priced well below the market median at AED 1,294/sqft and paired with a highly desirable 2-year post-handover payment plan, it offers strong potential for capital appreciation as Dubai South matures. The low absolute ticket size (approximately AED 519,000) combined with flexible payment terms makes it an excellent asset for high-leverage yield generation or mid-term capital gains, provided developer credentials and payment histories are thoroughly vetted.

Location and Connectivity:

Kamoon 1 is nestled within Old Town, a characterful Arabian-style enclave at the heart of Downtown Dubai. The building sits steps from Souk Al Bahar and within easy reach of the Burj Khalifa, the Dubai Fountain, Dubai Opera, and The Dubai Mall  one of the world's largest retail and dining destinations. Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard offers an outstanding array of luxury retail outlets, fine-dining restaurants, and trendy cafes, while Spinneys and Carrefour Market provide everyday convenience close by.

Downtown Dubai offers excellent connectivity via direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road (E11) and Financial Centre Road (D71), linking residents seamlessly to Business Bay, DIFC, and beyond. The Burj Khalifa/Dubai Mall Metro Station on the Red Line is easily accessible, and the community's pedestrian-friendly streets make walking a pleasure.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact James Federer.

Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

The apartment features a bright and well-laid-out living space, modern furnishings, a generously sized bedroom, and floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize natural light and the panoramic outlook. Currently vacant on transfer, the property is ready for immediate occupancy or rental, presenting a strong investment opportunity in one of Dubai Marina’s most sought-after residential towers.

Residents of Princess Tower enjoy access to premium amenities including indoor and outdoor swimming pools, fully equipped gymnasiums, sauna and steam rooms, children’s play areas, and 24-hour security.

title: Investor Deal | Luxury 1BR Waterfront Living
description:
Presented by Betterhomes
, this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in Marina Views at Rashid Yachts & Marina offers a rare opportunity to own a premium waterfront residence

Spanning 742.38 sq.ft, the apartment is thoughtfully designed with contemporary interiors, spacious living areas, and floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize natural light and create a seamless connection to the vibrant marina surroundings. The modern layout combines comfort and sophistication, making it ideal for both investors and end users seeking long-term value in a prestigious community.

Marina Views forms part of the iconic Rashid Yachts & Marina master development, where Riviera-inspired elegance meets Dubai’s dynamic urban lifestyle. Set within the historic Port Rashid district, the community is designed around a world-class marina capable of accommodating luxury yachts, alongside beautifully landscaped promenades, fine dining, boutique retail, and exclusive leisure experiences.

Residents will enjoy a wide range of premium amenities including swimming pools, fitness facilities, waterfront relaxation areas, and easy access to Dubai’s key landmarks. Perfectly positioned, the development offers excellent connectivity with Downtown Dubai just 10 minutes away and Dubai International Airport reachable within 15 minutes.

Community Description & Facilities:

DAMAC Hills is one of Dubai’s most recognized master-planned residential communities, offering a blend of luxury living, green landscapes, and a family-oriented lifestyle. Developed by DAMAC Properties, the community is located in Dubai Land and has become a popular choice for both residents and investors seeking a balance between tranquility and urban connectivity.

DAMAC Hills represents a modern approach to suburban living in Dubai. It combines luxury housing with extensive green spaces, world-class amenities, and a family-friendly environment. Whether it’s the golf course views, the abundance of recreational facilities, or the peaceful atmosphere, the community offers a distinctive lifestyle that sets it apart from many other developments in the city. While it may not suit those seeking a fast-paced urban experience, it is an excellent choice for individuals and families looking for comfort, space, and a high-quality living environment in Dubai.

description:
Property Highlights:

- Built-Up Area: 1,005 sq. ft.
- 2 Bedrooms, 2 Bathrooms

Community and Lifestyle Amenities:

- Temperature-controlled swimming pool
- Children's pool and play area
- State-of-the-art fitness centre
- Outdoor barbecue and dining area
- Multipurpose community room
- Active rooftop leisure deck
- Podium-level retail outlets
- 24-hour concierge service
- Round-the-clock security
- Covered underground parking

Location and Connectivity:

Burj Crown by Emaar sits on Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard, placing residents at the very centre of Downtown Dubai. The Dubai Mall, Burj Khalifa, Dubai Fountain, Souk Al Bahar, and Dubai Opera are all within easy reach, offering world-class dining, retail, entertainment, and cultural experiences on the doorstep. The vibrant boulevard itself is lined with boutique stores, cafes, and restaurants ideal for everyday leisure.

Connectivity is seamless, with direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road and Financial Centre Road linking residents to Business Bay, DIFC, and beyond. The Burj Khalifa/Dubai Mall Metro Station on the Red Line is close by, and the pedestrian-friendly boulevard makes walking a genuine daily pleasure.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact James Antony Federer.

WHY CHOOSE K O S PROPERTY?

description:
Apartment for sale in Creek Horizon Tower 1, Creek Horizon

Betterhomes is proud to present this 1 Bedroom Apartment located in Creek Horizon Tower 1, Creek Horizon, Dubai Creek Harbour (The Lagoons).

Unit Details:

* Rented 
* Park View
* Kitchen: Open
* Bathrooms: 1
* Built up Area: 752.50 square feet
* No. of Parking: 1
* Furnished

Features:

* Balcony
* Sea/Water view
* Security
* Intercom
* Concierge Service
* Conference room
* Public parking
* Prayer Room
* Shared Gym
* Pets Allowed
* Childrens play area

Dubai Creek is the cornerstone of Dubai’s heritage. Located next to Ras Al Khor wildlife sanctuary, a home to an abundance of native flora and fauna.

Creek Horizon Tower 1 sits at the heart of Creek Island, centrally positioned adjacent to the community's Central Park and overlooking the district's marina. Dubai Creek Harbour is a master-planned waterfront community by Emaar, offering a 6km harbour promenade lined with cafs, art installations, and dining venues, alongside the Dubai Creek Marina. The Ras Al Khor Wildlife Sanctuary, famous for its flamingos and tranquil lagoons, is just moments away, offering a rare natural escape within the city.

The community connects seamlessly to the wider city via Ras Al Khor Road (E44), placing Downtown Dubai and Business Bay approximately 15 minutes away. Dubai International Airport is also easily accessible, and a planned Dubai Metro expansion will further enhance public transport links.

Location and Connectivity:

Standpoint Tower 2 sits on Mohammed Bin Rashid Boulevard in the heart of Downtown Dubai, placing residents steps from the Dubai Opera, Burj Khalifa, Dubai Fountain, and The Dubai Mall. The Opera District setting makes this an especially sought-after address, surrounded by world-class dining, boutique retail along the Boulevard, and cultural landmarks at every turn. Souk Al Bahar and The Palace Downtown are also within easy reach, rounding out a lifestyle of unmatched urban convenience.

Downtown Dubai is superbly connected, with direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road and Financial Centre Road linking residents swiftly to Business Bay, DIFC, and beyond. The Burj Khalifa/Dubai Mall Metro Station on the Red Line provides seamless public transport links across the city, making daily commuting effortless from this premier address.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Frederick Malone.

title: Exclusive | Ultra Luxury | Smart Home
description:
Welcome to a residence where innovation meets exceptional design. This truly one-of-a-kind 3-bedroom apartment with an additional private guest suite has been completely reimagined, setting a new benchmark for luxury living in Dubai.

At its core is a sculpted natural stone kitchen designed for direct cooking—eliminating the need for conventional stovetops. A bespoke 360-degree rotating ceiling-mounted TV, finished in matching stone, reflects the seamless design language throughout. Everyday features such as the sink, flush, and storage elements are discreetly integrated into stone surfaces, revealing themselves only when needed—creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic with cutting-edge functionality.

Located in the prestigious Tiara Aquamarine tower on Palm Jumeirah, the apartment has undergone a full high-end transformation. Ambient lighting, premium finishes, and carefully curated furnishings create a refined yet welcoming atmosphere. The former maid’s room has been converted into a stylish fourth bedroom with its own en-suite, ideal as a guest suite.

Floor-to-ceiling windows and a spacious balcony showcase breathtaking views of Atlantis, Royal Atlantis, the harbour, and the Arabian Gulf.

Fully furnished, vacant, and move-in ready, the home includes two parking spaces.

Contact Leo Blomquist today to arrange your private viewing.

This bright, well-proportioned unit offers an open-plan living and dining area that flows onto a generous balcony with sweeping views across the JLT lakes and Dubai Marina skyline. The modern kitchen features fitted cabinetry and quality finishes. The master bedroom includes an ensuite bathroom and built-in wardrobes; the additional bedrooms are generous and flexible for family, guests or a home office. Large windows, premium finishes and thoughtful layout create a comfortable, contemporary living environment.

Key features

Three spacious bedrooms including master with ensuite
Open-plan living and dining opening to a wide balcony with panoramic views
Modern fitted kitchen with quality fixtures
Built-in wardrobes and ample storage
Family bathroom plus ensuite(s)
Allocated covered parking and visitor parking
Central A/C, high-speed elevators, 24/7 security
Building & community highlights

Developed and managed by Sobha Realty with a focus on premium finishes and maintenance
Full resident amenities: resort-style pool, fully equipped gym, landscaped podium and children’s play areas
Concierge and secure, staffed lobby with high-quality common areas
Excellent location in JLT with lakeside promenades, cafés, supermarkets and easy access to Sheikh Zayed Road
Short drive to Dubai Marina, JBR and major leisure and business hubs
Why this unit works
This 3BR unit combines practical family living with strong rental appeal thanks to its layout, quality finishes and sought-after Sobha build standards. Its location in JLT keeps daily conveniences and leisure options within easy reach while offering attractive views that enhance both lifestyle and resale value.

title: Prime Location | Investment | Modern Tower
description:
Betterhomes is delighted to offer you this luxurious One Bedroom Apartment for sale in prestigious Sparkle Tower 3, Dubai Marina. 

One of Dubai Marina's most iconic residential developments, Sparkle Towers is a twin-tower complex created in partnership with renowned Austrian crystal brand Swarovski and completed in 2020. The towers are connected by a podium and feature a stunning façade illuminated by over 1,700 lights and adorned with Swarovski crystal accents, creating a brilliant, jewel-like glow at night. 

Residents enjoy an impressive selection of amenities, including a fully equipped fitness center, spa, temperature-controlled swimming pools, separate saunas and Jacuzzis for men and women, and an exclusive residents' lounge. Ideally located along Marina Walk, Sparkle Towers offers easy access to the beach, Dubai Metro, and a variety of waterfront dining and leisure destinations. 

Property Features:
- Low Floor
- 800.73 Sq. Ft. 
- Ready to Move In
- Community View
- Fully Furnished and Equipped
- Swimming Pool & Gym
- Allotted Basement Parking Space

Location and Connectivity:
Neva Residences is a brand-new 17-storey development by Tiger Properties, set within the family-friendly community of Jumeirah Village Circle. The building sits within a neighbourhood renowned for its over 30 landscaped parks, jogging and cycling tracks, and a strong community atmosphere. Circle Mall, which features Spinneys, dining outlets, and retail shops, serves as the community's main lifestyle hub.

JVC is strategically positioned between Al Khail Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, offering excellent connectivity across Dubai. Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and Mall of the Emirates are all within a short drive, while Downtown Dubai is approximately 20 minutes away.

raw_area: SAAS Hills, Dubai Science Park, Dubai
description:
Discover elevated living at SAAS Hills, an architectural sanctuary by SAAS Properties where wellness, design, and serenity converge. Nestled within the natural topography of Dubai’s hillside terrain, this visionary project offers a lifestyle defined by privacy, balance, and sophisticated modernity.

This rare 2-bedroom apartment, is one of the most spacious layouts in the entire community, offering a total area of 2,142 Sqft — perfect for al fresco dining, relaxation, or hosting. 

Project Vision and Design
SAAS Hills was conceived with a singular purpose: to create a living experience rooted in wellness, architectural elegance, and timeless aesthetics. The facade features layered design elements that mirror the natural hillside, while interiors draw from a soft palette of textured stone, warm wood, and diffused light to promote calm and clarity. Vertical gardens and landscaped courtyards enhance the connection to nature throughout the property.

Community Amenities

Infinity-edge pool with skyline views

Rooftop fitness areas and yoga decks

Outdoor cinema and shaded BBQ terraces

Zen lounges, gardens, and walking paths

Concierge service, valet parking, and 24/7 security

Dedicated wellness areas for residents of all ages

Shaded children’s play areas and lush communal spaces

Location and Connectivity
Positioned in a fast-growing green district with excellent road connectivity and future metro access, SAAS Hills ensures effortless access to central Dubai while offering a peaceful retreat from the urban pace.

Payment Plans Available : 40/60

Price: AED AED 3,035,281
Unit Type: 2 Bedrooms
Total Area: 2,142 Sqft

This is more than a residence—it’s a lifestyle of refinement and quiet luxury, tailored for those who seek space, nature, and architectural distinction.

title: ULTRA LUXURY 1 BEDROOM | SEA VIEWS | 50/50 PP
raw_area: Lia by Avenew, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Discover refined waterfront living with this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in LIA by Avenew, located in the heart of Dubai Islands, where the serenity of the Arabian Gulf meets the vibrancy of a contemporary marina. Designed with balance, light, and functionality in mind, this residence reflects a modern coastal lifestyle shaped by nature and architectural precision.

The apartment offers a total area of 831 sq. ft. with a well-proportioned layout featuring an open-plan living and dining area seamlessly connected to a modern kitchen. The bedroom is complemented by a walk-in closet and an en-suite master bathroom, while a separate powder room and dedicated laundry space enhance everyday convenience. Floor-to-ceiling windows allow natural light to flow throughout, opening onto a private balcony ideal for relaxation.

LIA is a boutique G+8 residential building comprising only 81 exclusive residences, crafted with flowing architectural lines, tiered balconies, and lush greenery. Residents enjoy world-class amenities including a podium-level infinity pool, pool bar, fully equipped gym, lounge deck, BBQ areas, kids’ play zone, and a grand triple-height lobby designed as a serene arrival experience.

Strategically positioned, Dubai Islands offers a unique balance of tranquility and accessibility, with easy connections to Downtown Dubai, Dubai International Airport, retail, dining, and leisure destinations.

DIFC is one of Dubai's most mature and sought-after addresses, home to global financial institutions, world-class restaurants, and a thriving arts and culture scene. A rare opportunity to own in one of Dubai's most resilient and in-demand locations.

The apartment boasts floor-to-ceiling windows that fill the space with natural light, creating bright and inviting rooms. Additional features include built-in wardrobes and thoughtfully designed interiors that combine comfort with style.

Community Amenities:
- 24-hour security equipped with CCTV
- Parks

- Shared Pool

description:
Property Highlights:

- Built-Up Area: 411 sq. ft.
- Studio, 1 Bathroom
- Unfurnished
- Lagoon and City Views
- Off-Plan
- One Development - Laguna Residence
- Lowest Price Entry Point
- Stunning Views
- Covered Parking
- Balcony
- Built-in Wardrobes
- Central A/C
- 24/7 Security

Community and Lifestyle Amenities:

- UAE's largest podium lagoon
- Infinity pools and private beach area
- Indoor and outdoor cinemas
- Panoramic-view shared gym
- Shared spa and yoga zone
- Pilates studio and jogging track
- VR golf and multipurpose sports courts
- Children's play areas and splash pool
- Barbecue area and landscaped green spaces
- Co-working space and lobby lounge
- Lagoon walkway and viewing deck
- AI-powered smart home integration
- Concierge and 24/7 security

Location and Connectivity:

Laguna Residence sits within City of Arabia, a master-planned mixed-use community in Dubailand spanning nearly 185 acres. The development is designed to offer a calm, resort-inspired atmosphere while remaining seamlessly connected via Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road. Residents benefit from direct access to Mall of Arabia, a major retail and dining destination within the community, and IMG Worlds of Adventure, the world's largest indoor theme park, located just minutes away. Global Village, a popular seasonal cultural and entertainment hub, is also a short drive from the community. With lush green parks, scenic water features, and a growing array of retail, dining, and recreational facilities, City of Arabia offers a well-rounded lifestyle suited to families and investors alike.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Daniel Camilleri-kovacevic.

description:
Experience elevated branded living at Arthouse Hills Arjan, where timeless Manhattan-inspired elegance blends seamlessly with modern Dubai sophistication. Developed by Adaan Developments in partnership with Clédor, this beautifully designed 1-bedroom residence offers a refined lifestyle in one of Dubai’s fastest-growing residential destinations. 

This fully furnished apartment spans 797  and has been thoughtfully crafted to maximize natural light, comfort, and functionality. Featuring expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, premium European kitchen appliances, smart home technology, and elegant designer finishes, every detail reflects a lifestyle of balance and contemporary luxury. 

Property Details:
• 1 Bedroom Apartment
• Fully Furnished
• Size: 797 
• Price: AED 1,315,888
• Designer Interiors
• Completion: Q4 2028

Arthouse Hills is the first branded residences development in Arjan, offering residents a wellness-focused lifestyle surrounded by beautifully curated amenities and serene architectural design. Inspired by Japanese minimalism and modern urban living, the project creates an atmosphere of calm, sophistication, and exclusivity. 

World-Class Amenities:
• Rooftop Infinity Pool
• Family Pool & Kids’ Pool
• State-of-the-Art Fitness Studio
• Sauna & Cold Plunge
• Meditation & Zen Garden
• Sound Healing Area
• Rooftop Japanese Garden
• Wellness Bar
• Residents’ Library
• Games Room
• Exclusive Cigar Lounge
• Water Park
• Indoor & Outdoor Kids’ Play Area
• Forest Area

Perfectly located in Arjan, the development offers quick connectivity to Dubai Miracle Garden, Dubai Hills Mall, Business Bay, Downtown Dubai, Palm Jumeirah, and Dubai International Airport.
Flexible 60/40 Payment Plan:
• 60% During Construction
• 40% On Handover


Interested in this property or want to learn more? Get in touch today to explore investment opportunities at Arthouse Hills Arjan.

Where London prestige meets Dubai’s waterfront brilliance — welcome to Chelsea Residences by DAMAC, an exclusive collection of branded homes inspired by the legacy of Chelsea F.C. and the elegance of coastal living.

This expansive 2-bedroom residence, covering 1,610 sqft, offers a masterfully crafted layout with refined interiors, sweeping sea views, and a seamless flow between indoor comfort and outdoor serenity. Designed for those who demand excellence, every corner of this home reflects premium craftsmanship, curated aesthetics, and a branded lifestyle unlike any other in the city.

• Grand 2-bedroom layout with premium fittings and finishes
• Open-plan living and dining spaces with floor-to-ceiling windows
• Designer kitchen, spa-style bathrooms, and generous storage
• Starting from AED 4,575,000

This apartment offers a generous living and dining area with an open-plan kitchen, creating a seamless and modern layout. The living room opens onto a spacious balcony overlooking Dubai Hills Park, allowing natural light to flow throughout the entire home. All bedrooms are well-sized, and the maid’s room provides added convenience for families.

Park Horizon is well positioned on Dubai Hills Park, with Dubai Hills Mall only a few minutes away by car or a 10-minute walk. Residents enjoy access to premium amenities including a community swimming pool and gym, as well as nearby supermarkets, cafés, restaurants and pharmacies.

raw_area: Soulever by Beyond Tower 1, Soulever by Beyond, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Soulever by Beyond rises as Dubai Maritime City’s newest architectural landmark—two sculptural towers shaped by the sea, designed with precision, and infused with tranquility. Developed by Beyond Developments under the Omniyat Group, Soulever reflects Dubai’s maritime heritage through fluid forms, warm natural textures, and panoramic views of the Forest, the Cove, and the vibrant city skyline.

This 1-bedroom residence spans 855  offering a refined and efficient layout that blends living, dining, and balcony spaces with effortless flow. Floor-to-ceiling windows draw in natural light, opening your home to serene Forest and Cove views. Thoughtfully crafted interiors, a stylish powder room, and elevated ceiling heights create a sense of openness and calm—perfect for modern urban living.

Residents enjoy a suite of world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool overlooking the sea, a cutting-edge fitness center, yoga and wellness studios, spa facilities, a private library, residents lounge, event and co-working spaces, a dedicated kids’ area, and a lush landscaped podium with cafés and boutique retail.

Just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the ideal blend of waterfront serenity and city convenience—an exceptional lifestyle destination and a prime investment opportunity.

Price: AED 2,800,000
Size: 855 
View: Forest / Cove
Developer: Beyond Developments (Omniyat Group)

Interested in this 1-bedroom residence or exploring other units in Soulever? Reach out today for exclusive availability and investment insights in Dubai Maritime City.

title: WATERFRONT PARADISE I 2BR FULL SEA VIEW
description:
The Dubai Marina is the most impressive Dubai district with a stunning skyline, luxurious residential buildings and first-of-its-kind classy leisure facilities. With a length of 4 kilometers, the Dubai Marina offers a unique blend of modern architecture and feel-good ambience.
Here you will find exclusive restaurants, cafes and shopping centres. Along the promenade you can stroll, jog or just relax.
The Stella Maris Tower is an impressive gem. The building is characterized by its
modern architecture, luxurious furnishings and first-class amenities. The exclusive residential atmosphere and the breath taking view of the marina and the sea, make every day unique.
The spacious floor plans, high ceilings and floor-to-ceiling windows that allow plenty of natural light
will convince you of our offer.
You will find a luxurious pool area, a modern fitness center,an extra ladies gym, a spa and a communal lounge. In addition, the building offers a 24-hour concierge and security service, as well as a spacious underground parking and even its own cinema!
In the immediate neighbourhood you will find first-class restaurants and the Marina Mall. Stroll along the waterfront and take advantage of a variety of leisure and entertainment options.
The connection to the metro is only a few minutes walk away.

With this apartment, we offer you a unique property on the 21st floor.
The view of the marina and the sea is breath taking. On a spacious living area of 1515 square feet you will find comfortable and stylish living ambience.
In the light-flooded, spacious living room with floor-to-ceiling windows, you will feel at home
from the very first minute. The open kitchen has modern built-in appliances and offers plenty of storage space. 
The apartment has two bedrooms, each with built-in wardrobes.
The master bedroom offers a balcony. Another highlight of the apartment is the large balcony from which you can enjoy spectacular sunsets.

- 24/7 security and smart access
- Covered basement parking
- High-speed elevators
- Outdoor seating areas
- Circle Mall with retail, dining and Spinneys
- 30+ landscaped community parks

Location and Connectivity:

Belgravia Square is an Ellington Properties development nestled within Jumeirah Village Circle, one of Dubai's most sought-after family-friendly communities. Developed by Nakheel, JVC is home to over 30 landscaped parks, jogging and cycling tracks, sports courts, and a vibrant selection of cafes, restaurants, and supermarkets. Circle Mall, the community's main retail hub, places everyday conveniences within easy reach.

Strategically positioned between Al Khail Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, JVC offers seamless connectivity to Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, Dubai Media City, and Dubai Internet City. The building's location in District 14 places residents close to several reputable schools and healthcare facilities, making it an ideal home for professionals and families alike.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Hunter Steele Newman.

title: LOWEST PRICE UNIT | WATERFRONT | ULTRA LUXURY
raw_area: Soulever by Beyond Tower 1, Soulever by Beyond, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Where coastal calm meets urban pulse.
Soulever by Beyond is Dubai Maritime City’s new architectural icon – two sculptural towers rising above the sea, blending natural serenity with refined design. Developed by Beyond Developments under Omniyat Group, Soulever captures Dubai’s maritime legacy through elegant architecture and breathtaking panoramas of the Cove, the Forest, and the city skyline.

This 2-bedroom residence spans 1,469 and offers a graceful layout connecting living, dining, and balcony spaces in harmony. Expansive windows flood the interiors with daylight and soothing marina views. The home features a powder room, refined finishes, and generous ceiling heights that create an airy sense of calm – perfect for both leisure and family life.

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool, state-of-the-art gym, yoga and wellness areas, spa, library, residents lounge, event space, kids play area, and a beautifully landscaped podium park with cafés and retail avenues.

Perfectly positioned just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the perfect balance between vibrant city life and tranquil beachfront living.

Price: AED 5,311,000
Size: 1469 sqft 
View: Ocean Cove 
Developer: Beyond Developments (Omniyat Group)

Interested in this 2-bedroom or want to explore other Soulever residences? Get in touch today to discover exclusive investment opportunities in Dubai Maritime City.

title: Perfect Investment | High Floor | Vacant
description:
Betterhomes is pleased to offer you this stunning One Bedroom apartment located in the Marina Gate Tower 2 by Select Group, Dubai Marina. 

Perfectly positioned at the entrance of Dubai Marina, Marina Gate 2 offers direct access to Marina Walk, and is just minutes from the Metro, Tram, restaurants, cafés, and shops. This is modern waterfront living at its best. 

This one bedroom comes with fitted kitchen appliances, is bright and spacious and it is finished to a very high standard. The apartment has 2 bathrooms, separate laundry area and storage space. There is a balcony from the living room and there are floor to ceiling windows. The apartment is located on a high floor and is overlooking the community. The apartment is vacant and is an ideal option for end users and investors. 

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including two infinity pools, two state-of-the-art gyms, padel and squash courts, basketball/football courts, and the exclusive Amara Lounge. Marina Gate also features the luxurious Jumeirah Living Hotel offering premium services and facilities. 

Property Features:
- Spacious Balcony
- Fully fitted Kitchen
- Laundry Room & Storage Space
- Allotted Covered Parking Space
- 24 hours Concierge
- Infinity pools & Hi-Tech Gymnasium
- Basketball Court & Paddle Court
- Contact the Consultant for more information or to arrange a viewing. 

Finance is available on this property through Betterhomes Mortgage partners.

Residents benefit from easy access to beach clubs, retail, cafés and leisure, together with convenient road and monorail connections to Dubai Marina, Sheikh Zayed Road and the wider city.

description:
Experience refined luxury living in this exceptional 3 bedroom residence at the prestigious Taj Residences JLT, one of Dubai’s most iconic branded residential addresses. Designed with sophistication and comfort in mind, this spacious apartment offers breathtaking panoramic views of the Marina skyline, Emirates Golf Course, and the city beyond.

Featuring expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, elegant interiors, premium marble finishes, and a thoughtfully designed open layout, the apartment perfectly combines timeless luxury with modern functionality. The large living and dining area flows seamlessly onto spacious balconies, creating the ideal setting for both relaxation and entertaining.

All bedrooms are generously sized with en-suite bathrooms and built-in wardrobes, while the contemporary kitchen comes fully fitted with high-end European appliances and premium finishes.

Residents enjoy exclusive access to world-class Taj hospitality services and five-star amenities including an infinity pool, fully equipped gym, spa, yoga studio, concierge services, valet parking, and private resident lounges.

title: THE DORCHESTER COLLECTION | 30/70 PAYMENT PLAN
raw_area: Vela Viento By Omniyat, Business Bay, Dubai
description:
Step into a new dimension of waterfront luxury with this exceptional 2-bedroom + study residence at VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection, located in the heart of Marasi Bay. Developed by OMNIYAT and managed by the world-renowned Dorchester Collection, this project redefines elevated living through design, service, and exclusivity .

Spanning an impressive 3,920 sqft, this residence is designed to maximize space, light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The layout features a spacious open-plan living and dining area, complemented by a show kitchen and a separate back-of-house kitchen.

The residence offers two generously sized bedrooms, including a luxurious master suite with a walk-in dressing area and an elegant en-suite bathroom. A dedicated study adds flexibility for a home office or additional private space, while a maid’s room, laundry area, powder room, and private lift lobby enhance both comfort and privacy.

One of the defining features of this home is its expansive wraparound terraces, extending the living space outdoors and offering breathtaking views of the Burj Khalifa and Dubai Canal . These terraces create a perfect setting for entertaining, relaxation, and enjoying Dubai’s skyline in complete privacy.

VELA Viento is designed by Foster + Partners with interiors by Gilles & Boissier, blending architectural excellence with refined Parisian elegance. Residents enjoy a curated lifestyle with world-class amenities and Dorchester Collection’s legendary services, including concierge, valet, and bespoke hospitality offerings .

Located within Marasi Bay, the project connects seamlessly to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, and Dubai Canal, placing residents at the center of a vibrant waterfront destination.

Price: AED 24,700,000
Size: 3,920 sqft
Handover: Q4 2027
Payment Plan: 30/70
Fully Furnished
